positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical vector illustration of celestial flora and fauna. The composition features stylized, stylized mandalas of glowing cosmic roots, crescent moons, and geometric celestial bodies intertwined with bioluminescent, mystical flowers. The color palette should utilize deep sapphire blue, rich emerald green, and vibrant amethyst purple, accented with metallic gold linework and gradients. The style must be highly intricate, clean line art mixed with stylized Art Nouveau botanical elements, suitable for a central print motif on apparel. Composition must be perfect, centered, and highly contrastive, designed as a flat, two-tone screen print overlay.
